title: steenisia borneensis
intro: Steenisia borneensis, also known as the Borneo Steenisia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Borneo. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Steenisia borneensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve respiratory problems, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Steenisia borneensis can be used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
